'''chathuvu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycophagist|mycophagist]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-th-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycophagist|mycophagist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| chathuvu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:chæthivith|chæthivith]] || [[word:chæthivij|chæthivij]] || [[word:chæthivish|chæthivish]] || [[word:chæthivi|chæthivi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:chathuthuvuth|chathuthuvuth]] || [[word:chathuthuvuj|chathuthuvuj]] || [[word:chathuthuvush|chathuthuvush]] || [[word:chathuthuvu|chathuthuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:chathuvuth|chathuvuth]] || [[word:chathuvuj|chathuvuj]] || [[word:chathuvush|chathuvush]] || [[word:chathuvu|chathuvu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:chathufvuth|chathufvuth]] || [[word:chathufvuj|chathufvuj]] || [[word:chathufvush|chathufvush]] || [[word:chathufvuf|chathufvuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chathuvuthu|chathuvuthu]] || [[word:chathuvuju|chathuvuju]] || [[word:chathuvushu|chathuvushu]] || [[word:chathuvuku|chathuvuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chathuvuth|chathuvuth]] || [[word:chathuvuj|chathuvuj]] || [[word:chathuvush|chathuvush]] || [[word:chathuvu|chathuvu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chathuvuthul|chathuvuthul]] || [[word:chathuvujul|chathuvujul]] || [[word:chathuvushul|chathuvushul]] || [[word:chathuvukul|chathuvukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chathuvuthuthu|chathuvuthuthu]] || [[word:chathuvujuju|chathuvujuju]] || [[word:chathuvushushu|chathuvushushu]] || [[word:chathuvuku|chathuvuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chathuvuthun|chathuvuthun]] || [[word:chathuvujun|chathuvujun]] || [[word:chathuvushun|chathuvushun]] || [[word:chathuvukun|chathuvukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chathuvuthuoro|chathuvuthuoro]] || [[word:chathuvujuoro|chathuvujuoro]] || [[word:chathuvushuoro|chathuvushuoro]] || [[word:chathuvukuoro|chathuvukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
